iterations.theme: The Genesis and Early Evolution of Slopes: From a Personal Need to a Sustainable Subscription Business
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the foundational story of Slopes, from its inception as a solution to a personal problem, through its early struggles and monetization shifts, culminating in the decision to transition to a full-time subscription business. The next section will focus on scaling and marketing strategies.

chapters.topic: Podcast Introduction and Guest Overview
The Inspiration: Building a Better Snowboarding App
Launching as a Side Project & Transition to Full-Time
Early Monetization: Paid App Challenges and Low Revenue
Overcoming Niche Marketing Hurdles
The Strategic Pivot to Subscriptions (2015)
Pricing Strategy: Annual vs. Consumption-Based Passes
Adopting Auto-Renewable Subscriptions (2016)
The Decision to Go Full-Time on Slopes
Advice for Indie Developers: Balancing Side Projects and Full-Time Work

iterations.theme: Strategic Growth and Transparency: Marketing, Team Building, and Reaching $1M ARR
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration begins with the discussion of marketing and growth strategies, including the first hire, and continues through the journey to $1M ARR, emphasizing the importance of transparency and cost management, concluding with the podcast's outro.
